name: 骷髅匕首（★） | 外表生锈
nameZh: 骷髅匕首（★） | 外表生锈
descriptionEn: This skeletonized-tang knife has been taped at the handle for improved grip. The hole allows a finger to be threaded through for stability and safety. This memento from Siege is still perfectly operational although the exterior surfaces have rusted. Scars build character
descriptionZh: 这把镂空的匕首被绑在握把上以提升握感。刀身上的空洞允许手指伸过以提升稳定性与安全性。 这把来自围攻之势的纪念武器可以用一句话来形容：“败絮其外，金玉其中”。 疤痕塑造品格
